scenarios.description: After cache built, nodelistChanged invalidates shadowChildrenRef and childElementsList() recomputes on next call
scenarios.precondition: Element with one child accessed once to build cache, then empty() called to clear and nodelistChanged, then a new Element child appended
scenarios.expectedResult: child(0) returns the newly appended element after cache invalidation
pseudocode: TEST TC09 child cache rebuild after nodelistChanged
